'''Zubindi Ebsuk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] provider of fine [[Droch/Legends|droch]] appetizers, often genetically modifying them for increased size and flavor which caused mutations to occur like [[Dzym]]. [[Borga Besadii Diori|Borga]] was a large customer and like [[Beldorion]] hired him as his personal chef.

{{Char-stub}}
